description: Create a visualization in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset to highlight profitable vs. unprofitable orders. Create a calculation named 'Profit Status' that categorizes 'Profit' as 'Profitable' (if greater than or equal to 0) or 'Loss' (if less than 0). Generate a Stacked Bar Chart titled 'Regional Profitability Mix' showing the count of records by 'Region', colored by 'Profit Status'. Apply semantic coloring to set 'Profitable' to green and 'Loss' to red. Save the workbook to ~/Documents/Profit_Status_Analysis.dva.
